subcodes.first_line: O Land of Ṣád! Call thou to mind what the nations wrought against the kindred of the Messenger, and what befell thine inhabitants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ارض الصاد ان اذکری ما فعل الامه بال الرسول و ما ورد من اهلک علی ابناء
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Imam Husayn
